content:
MODULE: cosmos.memory.unified_memory
FILE: cosmos/memory/unified_memory.py (1106 lines)
CATEGORY: memory

DESCRIPTION: COSMOS UNIFIED MEMORY ARCHITECTURE
=======================================

The most advanced multi-layered memory system integrating all 18 memory types
into a cohesive architecture with lightweight session references for agents.

Memory Systems Integrated:
1.  Working Memory       - Current task s

CLASSES:
- MemoryTier(Enum): Memory storage tiers by access speed/freshness
- MemoryDomain(Enum): Semantic domains for routing
- QueryIntent(Enum): Types of memory queries
- SessionReference: Lightweight token for agent memory access.

Agents receive this at session start
  Methods: def add_query(self, query: str)
  Methods: def update_context(self, topics: List[str]=None, entities: List[str]=None, projects: List[str]=None)
  Methods: def get_context_hints(self) -> Dict
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict
- MemoryResult: Unified result from any memory system
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict
- RoutingDecision: Decision about which memory systems to query
- MemoryRouter: Routes queries to optimal memory systems based on:
- Query intent classification
  Methods: def classify_intent(self, query: str) -> QueryIntent
  Methods: def classify_domain(self, query: str, context: Dict) -> List[MemoryDomain]
  Methods: def route(self, query: str, session: SessionReference, max_latency_ms: int=None) -> RoutingDecision
- MemoryPipeline: Processing pipeline for memory operations.

Stages:
1. Pre-process: Expand query
  Methods: async def process(self, query: str, session: SessionReference, systems: Dict[str, Any], top_k: int=1
- UnifiedMemoryAPI: Single interface for all 18 memory systems.

Provides:
- Session management with
  Methods: async def initialize(self)
  Methods: def create_session(self, agent_id: str) -> SessionReference
  Methods: def get_session(self, session_id: str) -> Optional[SessionReference]
  Methods: def end_session(self, session_id: str)
  Methods: async def query(self, query: str, session: SessionReference, top_k: int=10, systems: List[str]=None,
  Methods: async def remember(self, content: str, session: SessionReference, tags: List[str]=None, importance: 
  Methods: async def forget(self, memory_id: str, session: SessionReference) -> bool
  Methods: async def get_timeline(self, session: SessionReference, start_date: datetime=None, end_date: datetim

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_unified_memory_api() -> UnifiedMemoryAPI
- async def mcp_create_session(agent_id: str) -> Dict
- async def mcp_query_memory(query: str, session_id: str, top_k: int=10, systems: List[str]=None) -> List[Dict]
- async def mcp_remember(content: str, session_id: str, tags: List[str]=None, importance: float=0.5) -> Dict
- async def mcp_get_related(entity_or_topic: str, session_id: str, depth: int=2) -> List[Dict]
- async def mcp_get_memory_stats() -> Dict
